summary: Variadic dimensions silently unify with incompatible types via catch-all Ok(())
detail: The catch-all `_ => Ok(())` in unify() accepts Variadic('x') unifying with Literal(512). Add explicit patterns for Variadic and return error for unexpected Dim combinations.

summary: Named vs Expr dimension unification incomplete; catch-all silently succeeds
detail: Named(dim) vs Expr(dim+1) falls through to catch-all Ok(()). Add Named-vs-Expr arm that evaluates expr and unifies result.

summary: Both-variadic shapes not rigorously checked; only validates prefix/suffix
detail: [*a, 512] vs [256, *b, 512] passes without checking fixed-point overlap. Implement rigorous overlap check.

summary: Reshape @reduce fallback silently computes wrong dimensions
detail: When source shape unavailable, fallback assumes trailing dims. Non-trailing reductions silently generate wrong code. Only emits eprintln. Should return CodegenError. Also: PR34-58 flags the eprintln itself, PR34-51 flags the wrong code generation.

summary: Symbol table returns first arm's ports for Match/If without validating consistency
detail: all_arm_ports[0].clone() returned without checking all arms produce same port signature. Add consistency check across branches.

summary: Cycle detection reports only first cycle found; break prevents collecting all
detail: Remove break statement after first cycle error to collect ALL cycles. Violates project's 'collect all errors' pattern.

summary: String-based Python generation has unescaped injection risk
detail: Variable names from IR embedded directly into Python output. Add variable name sanitization — validate all binding names are valid Python identifiers before codegen.
skip_reason: Grammar ident rule already constrains names to safe Python identifiers

summary: Unsafe unwrap() in wasm.rs filter/analyze closures
detail: program.neurons.get(*name).unwrap() can panic. Replace with filter_map or if-let. Also at line 236.

summary: Registry::default() panics when home directory unavailable
detail: Self::new().expect() in Default impl panics. Breaks trait contract. Either remove Default impl or handle gracefully.

summary: Ed25519 error suppression returns Ok(false) for all failures
detail: verify_signature() returns Ok(false) on all errors. Cannot distinguish format/crypto errors from actual mismatch. Return distinct error variants.
skip_reason: ed25519 verify() only returns signature errors; Ok(false) is correct

summary: Public validate() mutates its &mut Program parameter as side effect
detail: validate() desugars @wrap and expands unrolls as hidden side effects. Doc comment was updated but the API design is surprising. Consider splitting into prepare() + validate().

summary: 8 hard-coded process::exit(1) calls bypass miette error formatting
detail: Replace process::exit(1) calls at lines 705, 723, 770, 821+ with Err(miette::miette!(...)) to unify error output.

summary: Hardcoded local deploy path in website/package.json
detail: deploy script uses cp -r build/* /Users/tquick/projects/neuroscript-docs/ — machine-specific. Replace with portable alternative or remove.

summary: Local file dependency for docusaurus-llms-generator in website/package.json
detail: file:../../docusaurus-llms-generator is a path outside the repo. npm install fails for anyone else. Replace with published package or remove.

summary: No semantic validation that @wrap target accepts Neuron-typed first param
detail: @wrap(Linear, 512): attn desugars to Linear(attn, 512) without checking Linear's first param is : Neuron typed. Validator should reject this.

summary: __sequential__ can collide with user-defined neuron names
detail: No validation prevents user-defined __dunder__ names. Add ValidationError for neuron names starting with __.

summary: No integration test for @wrap inside an unroll block
detail: The ordering fix (expand_unrolls before desugar_wraps) is critical but untested. Add test nesting @wrap inside an unroll template.
skip_reason: Agent found no testable wrap+unroll interaction beyond existing coverage

summary: Others in @repeat(copy) misclassified as 'not new'
detail: _ => false fallback treats Others as existing dim. expand(-1) for Others slot has undefined semantics in @repeat context.

summary: Two distinct dim-to-Python conversion paths (context-aware vs not)
detail: If param names appear in repeat dims, the non-context-aware path emits raw name instead of self.name. Unify dim-to-Python conversion.

summary: Others -> Dim::Wildcard loses rank-collapsing semantics in to_shape()
detail: ReshapeDim::Others maps to Dim::Wildcard but they are semantically different. Others = collapse remaining dims to -1. Wildcard = one unknown dim. TODO exists at line 325.

summary: to_shape() drops Binding expression constraint
detail: dh=dim/heads becomes Dim::Named('dh') — shape solver can't verify divisibility. TODO exists at line 324.

summary: InvalidReshape/InvalidAnnotation error variants lack miette source spans
detail: Lines 683-689 show only message: String, context: String — no Span fields. Add SourceSpan for user-facing error diagnostics.

summary: No validation that @reduce target dims are reachable from source
detail: => @reduce(mean) [b, c, x] where x isn't a source dim generates undefined Python name at runtime.

summary: @reduce doesn't validate rank actually decreases
detail: Validator should verify target shape has fewer dimensions than source for @reduce.

summary: literal_product uses i64 instead of BigUint
detail: Uses i64 with checked_mul. Rest of shape system uses BigUint to avoid overflow. Should be consistent.

summary: No test for @reduce/fat-arrow inside match arm pipeline
detail: Codegen handles this via arm_reshape_src resolution but there is no test exercising a fat arrow inside a match arm pipeline.

summary: Mobile deep-link does not show detail panel
detail: Hash-change handler and initial mount only call setSelectedNeuron without setMobileShowDetail(true). Detail panel stays hidden on mobile deep links.

summary: Einsum stdlib docstring says '1-3 inputs' but only 2 ports exist
detail: Line 16 reads 'Supports 1-3 input tensors' but neuron only declares in a and in b. Fix docstring.

summary: No CI step for WASM build target
detail: Add cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown to CI to catch WASM breakage automatically.

summary: Test generates invalid Python (batch undefined at runtime)
detail: test_codegen_fat_arrow_reshape_in_match_arm uses Wildcard input but reshape target uses named 'batch'. Generated Python has undefined batch. Fix test to use consistent dimension names.

summary: ALiBi absolute-distance bias wrong for causal/decoder attention
detail: Uses torch.abs() for distances — only correct for bidirectional attention. Add documentation noting limitation, or add causal parameter.

summary: WaveNetBlock doc says 'causal' but padding is symmetric
detail: Doc comment says 'dilated causal convolution' but padding formula dilation * (kernel_size - 1) / 2 is symmetric. Fix doc or change padding.

summary: ConstScale docs describe Scale instead of ConstScale
detail: Parameter listed as 'dim' with shape [*, dim] instead of scalar 'factor'. Content was copied from Scale docs without updating.

summary: Contract resolution shape matching uses only defaults, not call-site args
detail: Neurons without parameter defaults may fail contract matching even when call site provides concrete values.

summary: Hardcoded stdlib include_str! list needs build.rs automation
detail: 82+ include_str!() calls hardcoded. Must be manually updated when stdlib files change. Consider build.rs or include_dir! crate.

summary: Span tracking uses hardcoded 80-char-per-line heuristic
detail: estimate_offset(line, col) uses hardcoded 80 chars per line to convert line/col to byte offset. Imprecise. Compute from actual source text.

summary: shapes_compatible overly permissive for unresolved variables
detail: Named and expression dimensions always return true for compatibility. If same named dimension has conflicting concrete values (dim=512 vs dim=256) the mismatch is missed.

summary: No limit on total expanded bindings across multiple unroll groups
detail: Individual unroll count limited to 1024 but combinatorial explosion possible: unroll(100) + unroll(100) = 10,000. Add total binding limit.

summary: process_destination() is 850 lines with 5+ nesting levels
detail: Decompose into per-endpoint-type functions: process_ref_destination(), process_call_destination(), process_match_destination(), etc.

summary: Clone-heavy context isolation in shape inference
detail: Entire InferenceContext (4 HashMaps) cloned per match arm / if branch / call. Use scoped save/restore instead.

summary: Flatten silently reduces unknown shapes to [0]
detail: When shape contains named/variadic dims or size overflows, flatten() produces [0]. Should return Result or preserve structure.

summary: Expression solving returns Ok(()) for unhandled operators
detail: solve_expr_for_unknown returns Ok(()) instead of error for unhandled operators. Silently gives up on constraint solving.

summary: Global dimension evaluation not implemented
detail: evaluate_dim() returns None for Dim::Global. @global dimensions in shape expressions won't work. Implement or raise early validation error.

summary: StdlibRegistry register_all_primitives() not scalable — 630 lines of manual calls
detail: 100+ explicit register() calls. Consider table-driven initialization with array of tuples processed in a loop.
